arts.ttl: Lyon react to ‘extremely severe’ and ‘unprecedented’ 9-month ban handed to Paulo Fonseca
arts.sum: Yesterday, on the day of his 52nd birthday, Paulo Fonseca was handed a nine-month ban for confronting referee Benoît Millot in the dying moments of Olympique Lyonnais’ 2-1 victory over…

arts.ttl: Lyon predicted XI v FCSB: Georges Mikautadze to start in place of Alexandre Lacazette
arts.sum: Olympique Lyonnais head into their UEFA Europa League Round of 16 first leg against FCSB with their squad at full strength, leaving Paulo Fonseca with some difficult decisions to make.…

arts.ttl: Lyon boss Paulo Fonseca handed remarkable NINE-MONTH ban for confronting referee
arts.sum: Paulo Fonseca was sent off in stoppage time of Lyon's 2-1 victory over Brest on Sunday, having squared up to referee Benoit Millot, who was about to review a potential penalty through VAR

arts.ttl: Lyon boss Fonseca gets nine-month ban for confronting referee
arts.sum: Lyon manager Paulo Fonseca is suspended from conducting his matchday duties for almost nine months after angrily confronting a referee.

arts.ttl: Lyon boss Fonseca gets nine-month ban for confronting referee
arts.sum: Lyon manager Paulo Fonseca is suspended from conducting his matchday duties for almost nine months after angrily confronting a referee.

arts.ttl: Lyon head coach Paulo Fonseca handed nine-month ban for confronting referee
arts.sum: Coach banned from domestic matches until 30 November Fonseca was sent off by Benoît Millot in win over Brest The Lyon head coach, Paulo Fonseca, has been suspended for nine months after his heated confrontation with referee Benoît Millot. Ligue de Football Professional (LFP), the governing body which oversees Ligue 1, announced the ban on Wednesday. Fonseca angrily confronted Millot during his team’s 2-1 league victory over Brest on Sunday. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Lyon coach banned for NINE months after 'head butting' referee in explosive touchline clash
arts.sum: Paulo Fonseca will not be on the touchline until the end of November

arts.ttl: Lyon manager Paulo Fonseca hit with NINE-MONTH ban
arts.sum: Olympique Lyon head coach Paulo Fonseca has been handed a huge nine-month ban for 'intimidating' referee Benoit Millot. Lyon manager Paulo Fonseca hit with NINE-MONTH ban

arts.ttl: ‘It was abnormal, it will never happen again’ – Former colleagues defend Paulo Fonseca amid off-field struggles following his referee outburst
arts.sum: Lyon manager Paulo Fonseca has come under increased scrutiny recently following his actions during OL’s 2-1 victory against Brest. The Portuguese head coach reacted infurtiatedly at a decision made by…
